name: tank-dome
description: Generate a WAAM propellant tank dome profile
promptTemplate:
Generate a WAAM propellant tank dome using the tank_dome profile command. Parameters:
- neck_radius: {{neck_radius}} mm (port opening)
- tank_radius: {{tank_radius}} mm (main body)
- total_height: {{total_height}} mm (dome height)
- tension: {{tension}} (0-1, Bézier curve tension)
- lead_in_length: {{lead_in_length}} mm
- lead_out_length: {{lead_out_length}} mm

Use compaction.mode: safeguard. Ensure the dome is watertight and overhang angle stays under 45°.

name: cylinder
promptTemplate: Create a cylinder with radius {{radius}} mm and height {{height}} mm. Center it at the origin.

name: boolean-subtract
promptTemplate: Perform a boolean subtraction: {{target}} minus {{tool}}. Use the OCC boolean engine. Verify the result is manifold (watertight) and report any errors.

name: revolve
description: Revolve a 2D profile into a solid of revolution
promptTemplate: Revolve the profile around the Z axis to create a watertight solid. Profile points: {{profile_points}}. Use lathe() with {{steps}} steps. Verify manifold geometry after creation.

name: fillet
promptTemplate: Apply a fillet with radius {{radius}} mm to the specified edge(s) of {{solid_name}}. Use the OCC fillet operation and verify the result is still manifold.

name: shell
description: Hollow out a solid to create a thin shell
promptTemplate: Create a hollow shell from {{solid_name}} with wall thickness {{thickness}} mm. Remove the {{face}} face to create an opening. Use OCC shell operation.

name: tank-assembly
description: Generate a full propellant tank assembly (body + dome + skirts)
promptTemplate:
Generate a complete WAAM propellant tank assembly with:
- Cylindrical body: diameter {{diameter}} mm, length {{body_length}} mm
- Dome profile: neck_radius {{neck_radius}} mm, tension {{tension}}
- Skirts: top and bottom, {{skirt_length}} mm long
- Wall thickness: {{wall_thickness}} mm

Export as a single manifold solid. Target volume: {{volume}} liters.

name: debug-boolean
check-manifold
promptTemplate:
Check if the geometry {{solid_name}} is manifold (watertight). Run trimesh.is_watertight and report:
- Is it watertight?
- Number of open edges (should be 0)
- Number of faces, vertices
- Any self-intersections?

If not manifold, suggest the most likely cause and fix.
